subcodes.first_line: This grieving servant, who hath been made to dwell in the land of sorrow and hath been nourished by the essence of grief and from the wellsprings of sadness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این عبد حزین که در ارض حزن جالس شده و از جواهر حزن مرزوق گشته و از سواذج حزن
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love as fire, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
